<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Guselkumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Adult plaque psoriasisTremfya is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis in adults who are candidates for systemic therapy.  Paediatric plaque psoriasisTremfya is indicated...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（99.8%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（99.8%）</li>
<li class="indication-matched">psoriasis（99.8%）<span class="indication-tag">📰 psoriasis</span></li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（99.7%）</li>
<li>renal osteodystrophy（99.7%）</li>
<li>ulcerative colitis (disease)（99.7%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis with juvenile macular dystrophy（99.7%）</li>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（99.6%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（99.6%）</li>
<li>non-renal secondary hyperparathyroidism（99.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
